name: I have back problems before, can I still claim ladder fall at work?

mainEntity.name: I have back problems before, can I still claim ladder fall at work?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, claim aggravation of pre-existing condition** via workers' comp.[4]

Medical records must link fall to worsening; doctors opine causation.[1]

- Get imaging comparing pre/post.
- Note symptom changes.
- Avoid gaps in treatment.

Common issue; evidence key.
